raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation urging urgent self-understanding of cosmic order, divine source, and finite time for inner calm",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a governing divine or natural principle exists from which humans originate",
    "human existence has a fixed temporal limit after which no return is possible",
    "failure to use time for calming inner disturbances wastes the sole opportunity for such work",
    "true nature of world and governor can be understood by the individual"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within Stoic-theistic metaphysics linking ontology, temporality, and moral psychology; assumes unargued metaphysical premises",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient accepts relevant metaphysics or finds secular analogues (mortality awareness, self-regulation) valuable; AI deployment aims to support reflective or eudaimonic ends without doctrinal imposition",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "metaphysical claims treated as factual requirements for AI alignment; guidance used to embed sectarian religious content or to devalue non-theistic value systems"
}
